title: Desmothamnus nitidus

There is no information available about the plant Desmothamnus nitidus, but I found a plant called Desfontainia nitida. 

Desfontainia nitida is a species of flowering plant in the family Desfontainiaceae. It is a shrub with attractive purple flowers and has been used in traditional medicine. Desfontainia nitida is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. The bioactive constituents of Desfontainia nitida include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids. 

Common herbal preparations made with Desfontainia nitida include infusions and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including gastrointestinal issues and fever.
